name: get_commit
description: Get details for a commit from a GitHub repository

detail.description: Level of detail to include for changed files. "none" omits stats and files entirely. "stats" (default) includes per-file metadata: filename, status, and lines-of-code counts (additions, deletions, changes), with no patch content. "full_patch" additionally includes the unified diff content for each file and can be very large.

perPage.description: Results per page for pagination (min 1, max 100)

sha.description: Commit SHA, branch name, or tag name
